udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Merged error set covering both stream lifecycle and protocol admin errors.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: StreamError

params.doc: Flat platform fee paid in XLM at stream creation. Mirrors Solana's flat SOL platform_fee.
params.name: xlm_platform_fee

params.doc: Keeper gas reimbursement: (duration/frequency) * base_fee, paid in XLM.
params.name: xlm_base_fee

params.doc: Status after this withdrawal. Either "Active" (stream still running) or "Drained" (fully withdrawn).
params.name: new_status

params.doc: Status after topup. Always "Active" (topup revives a Drained stream).
params.name: new_status

udt_union_v0.doc: Instance storage key: protocol-wide config (fees, whitelist, frequencies).
udt_union_v0.name: ConfigKey

udt_union_v0.doc: Persistent storage keys: per-stream state, per-sender whitelist flag, and per-tenant fee config.
udt_union_v0.name: StreamKey

tuple_v0.doc: Keyed by the caller-supplied stream_id (random BytesN<32>, like Solana's account keypair).
tuple_v0.name: Stream

tuple_v0.doc: True iff `sender` is whitelisted to create streams.
tuple_v0.name: WhitelistedSender

tuple_v0.doc: Per-sender (tenant) fee override. When present, overrides global StreamConfig fee fields.\nMirrors Solana's per-tenant StreamConfig PDA keyed by config_name.
tuple_v0.name: TenantConfig

udt_struct_v0.doc: Matches Solana's PaymentStream field-for-field (with Stellar naming conventions).
udt_struct_v0.name: PaymentStream

fields.doc: When true any caller may invoke trigger_topup(); gate is the SAC allowance.
fields.name: auto_topup_enabled

fields.doc: When true any caller may invoke withdraw_stream; tokens always go to receiver.\nOnly stream.withdraw_account (the keeper) is authorised to trigger it.
fields.name: automatic_withdrawal

fields.doc: Immutable creation-time duration. end_time shifts on pause/resume.
fields.name: duration

fields.doc: Gross amount before fees/cliff. Mirrors Solana full_amount.
fields.name: full_amount

fields.doc: Initial buffer duration in seconds. 0 = full pre-fund (legacy).
fields.name: initial_buffer_secs

fields.doc: Unix timestamp until which the vault is funded.
fields.name: last_covered_time

fields.doc: Unix timestamp of most recent successful withdrawal. 0 until first withdrawal.
fields.name: last_withdraw_time

fields.doc: Ceiling for vested_at() \xe2\x80\x94 net amount after fees and cliff.
fields.name: total_net_amount

fields.doc: Keeper address that may call withdraw_stream when automatic_withdrawal is true.\nSnapshot of StreamConfig.withdraw_account at creation time.
fields.name: withdraw_account

udt_struct_v0.doc: A single tier in an amount-based fee schedule.\nReserved for future use.
udt_struct_v0.name: FeeTier

fields.doc: Exclusive upper bound. 0 = no upper limit (catch-all).
fields.name: max_amount

udt_struct_v0.doc: Protocol-wide configuration stored in instance storage.
udt_struct_v0.name: StreamConfig

fields.doc:
Per-withdrawal keeper gas reimbursement in token base units.
Charged as: (duration / accrual_frequency) * base_fee.
For continuous streams (accrual_frequency == 0) applies once flat.
Mirrors Solana: (duration / stream_frequency) * base_fee in SOL.
Paid in XLM (native Stellar token) \xe2\x80\x94 separate from the streamed token.
fields.name: base_fee

fields.doc: Fee recipient address (receives platform + base fees).
fields.name: fee_recipient

fields.doc: Tiered fee schedule (up to 5 tiers). Reserved for future use.
fields.name: fee_tiers

fields.doc: Whitelisted accrual frequencies in seconds. Empty = any allowed.\n0 = continuous (always whitelisted implicitly).
fields.name: frequencies

fields.doc: Flat fee per stream in XLM base units (stroops). Charged at creation.\nMirrors Solana's flat `platform_fee` in SOL \xe2\x80\x94 not BPS-based.
fields.name: platform_fee

fields.doc: Tokens whitelisted for streaming. Max 150.
fields.name: whitelisted_tokens

fields.doc: Keeper address authorised to call withdraw_stream on automatic streams.\nMirrors Solana's StreamConfig.withdraw_account.
fields.name: withdraw_account

fields.doc: XLM SAC address used to collect the base_fee gas reimbursement.\nMirrors Solana where fees are paid in SOL regardless of streamed token.
fields.name: xlm_token

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Per-sender (tenant) fee configuration.

Mirrors Solana's per-tenant `StreamConfig` PDA (keyed by `config_name`).
When a `TenantConfig` exists for the stream sender it fully overrides the
global `StreamConfig` fee fields: `fee_recipient`, `platform_fee`,
`base_fee`, and `fee_tiers`.  Global token/frequency whitelists still apply.
`xlm_token` is always taken from global config (network-level constant).
udt_struct_v0.name: TenantConfig

fields.doc: Per-withdrawal keeper gas reimbursement in XLM base units.\nCharged as: (duration / accrual_frequency) * base_fee, paid in XLM.
fields.name: base_fee

fields.doc: Address that receives fees from streams created by this tenant.
fields.name: fee_recipient

fields.doc: Tiered fee schedule (up to 5 tiers). Reserved for future use.
fields.name: fee_tiers

fields.doc: Flat fee per stream in XLM base units (stroops). Mirrors Solana's flat platform_fee.
fields.name: platform_fee

fields.doc: Keeper address for automatic streams created by this tenant.\nOverrides global StreamConfig.withdraw_account when set.
fields.name: withdraw_account

fields.doc: Seconds per tick; 0 or 1 = continuous vesting.
fields.name: accrual_frequency

fields.doc: Enable trigger_topup(); sender must pre-approve contract via token.approve().
fields.name: auto_topup

fields.doc: Seconds of initial buffer. 0 = full pre-fund (legacy).
fields.name: initial_buffer_secs

function_v0.doc: Initialise the protocol. Sets the owner and the initial StreamConfig.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc: Atomically update all mutable config fields in one call.
function_v0.name: update_config

function_v0.doc: Read back the tenant fee config for `sender`. Returns None if not set (uses global).
function_v0.name: get_tenant_config

function_v0.doc: Set (or overwrite) a per-tenant fee config for `sender`.\nWhen set, streams created by `sender` will route fees to `fee_recipient`\nusing this fee schedule instead of the global config.
function_v0.name: set_tenant_config

function_v0.doc: Remove the per-tenant fee config for `sender`. Streams will fall back to global config.
function_v0.name: remove_tenant_config

function_v0.doc:
Create a new payment stream.

`stream_id` must be unique random bytes \xe2\x80\x94 generate with
`crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(32))` on the client (same as Solana's
freshly generated account keypair). Duplicate IDs are rejected.
function_v0.name: create_stream

function_v0.doc: Automatic top-up: any caller may trigger. Security gate is the SAC allowance.
function_v0.name: trigger_topup

function_v0.doc:
Returns `Some(Address)` if ownership is set, or `None` if ownership has
been renounced.

# Arguments

* `e` - Access to the Soroban environment.
function_v0.name: get_owner

function_v0.doc:
Initiates a 2-step ownership transfer to a new address.

Requires authorization from the current owner. The new owner must later
call `accept_ownership()` to complete the transfer.

# Arguments

* `e` - Access to the Soroban environment.
* `new_owner` - The proposed new owner.
* `live_until_ledger` - Ledger number until which the new owner can
accept. A value of `0` cancels any pending transfer.

# Errors

* [`OwnableError::OwnerNotSet`] - If the owner is not set.
* [`crate::role_transfer::RoleTransferError::NoPendingTransfer`] - If
trying to cancel a transfer that doesn't exist.
* [`crate::role_transfer::RoleTransferError::InvalidLiveUntilLedger`] -
If the specified ledger is in the past.
* [`crate::role_transfer::RoleTransferError::InvalidPendingAccount`] -
If the specified pending account is not the same as the provided `new`
address.

# Notes

* Authorization for the current owner is required.
function_v0.name: transfer_ownership

function_v0.doc:
Accepts a pending ownership transfer.

# Arguments

* `e` - Access to the Soroban environment.

# Errors

* [`crate::role_transfer::RoleTransferError::NoPendingTransfer`] - If
there is no pending transfer to accept.

# Events

* topics - `["ownership_transfer_completed"]`
* data - `[new_owner: Address]`
function_v0.name: accept_ownership

function_v0.doc:
Renounces ownership of the contract.

Permanently removes the owner, disabling all functions gated by
`#[only_owner]`.

# Arguments

* `e` - Access to the Soroban environment.

# Errors

* [`OwnableError::TransferInProgress`] - If there is a pending ownership
transfer.
* [`OwnableError::OwnerNotSet`] - If the owner is not set.

# Notes

* Authorization for the current owner is required.
function_v0.name: renounce_ownership
